ddls:
CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the database was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the database is active or not */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who owns the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_databases_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection setting */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the setting belongs to */,
  "sequential" INTEGER /* Whether the messages should be polled and injected sequentially */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Class name of the database driver */,
  "url" TEXT /* JDBC URL of the database */,
  "username" TEXT /* User name to connect to the database */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password to connect to the database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the connection setting is active or not */,
  "connection_timeout" INTEGER /* Timeout for database connections in seconds */,
  "idle_timeout" INTEGER /* Idle timeout for connections in seconds */,
  "max_lifetime" INTEGER /* Maximum lifetime of connections in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_settings_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, tester) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user is active or not */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "lockout_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was locked out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the role is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the user-role relationship is active or not */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_pools" (
  "pool_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection pool */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the pool belongs to */,
  "max_connections" INTEGER /* Maximum number of connections in the pool */,
  "min_connections" INTEGER /* Minimum number of connections in the pool */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection pool was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection pool was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the connection pool is active or not */,
  "max_idle_time" INTEGER /* Maximum idle time for connections in the pool in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pool_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_connection_pools_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the transaction belongs to */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the transaction */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the transaction */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., committed, rolled back) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the transaction is active or not */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who initiated the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "error_logs" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error log */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the error log belongs to */,
  "error_time" TEXT /* Time the error occurred */,
  "error_message" TEXT /* Error message */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error log was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the error log is active or not */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who encountered the error */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transaction associated with the error */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_error_logs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the audit log belongs to */,
  "audit_time" TEXT /* Time the action occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., login, query execution) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audit log was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the audit log is active or not */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "security_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each security setting */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the setting belongs to */,
  "encryption" INTEGER /* Whether encryption is enabled */,
  "ssl" INTEGER /* Whether SSL is enabled */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the security setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the security setting is active or not */,
  "firewall_enabled" INTEGER /* Whether firewall is enabled */,
  "allowed_ips" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of allowed IP addresses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_security_settings_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "backup_settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each backup setting */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the setting belongs to */,
  "backup_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of backups (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "backup_retention" INTEGER /* Number of days to retain backups */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backup setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the backup setting was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the backup setting is active or not */,
  "last_backup_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last backup */,
  "next_backup_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the next scheduled backup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_backup_settings_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "database_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database the permission belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission granted (e.g., read, write, execute) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Whether the permission is active or not */,
  "granted_by_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who granted the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_permissions_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_database_permissions_granted_by_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
